projectDescription: A Windows Forms desktop application for user authentication with brute-force protection and account lockout mechanisms
keyFeatures: Brute-force protection with configurable attempt limits
Automatic account lockout after failed login attempts
Asynchronous UI with non-blocking timeout handling
publicApiSurface: Usuario class - User entity with name and password properties
GestorAcceso class - Access manager with validation and lockout logic
GestorAcceso.AgregarUsuario() - Add new user to the system
GestorAcceso.EstaBloqueado() - Check if system is locked
GestorAcceso.IntentosFallidos - Get current failed attempts count
Form1 - Main Windows Forms UI with login and registration controls
